error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: HTTP Request Node Authentication Failure
symptom: The HTTP Request Node fails with 'Authorization failed - please check your credentials' when using generic credential authentication. Hardcoding the Authorization Header works fine.
not_this_if: Authorization works when hardcoded in headers
root_cause: The HTTP Request Node may not be correctly configured to use the generic credential authentication method, leading to failed authorization attempts. This can occur if the credentials are not properly linked or if the authentication type is not set correctly.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request Node settings
Change the authentication type to 'Generic Header'
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Change the authentication type to 'Generic Header' in the HTTP Request Node settings.
